task:
In Google Chrome, perform a browsing trail that ends with all four of these Wikipedia pages in the browsing history:
1. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/World_Wide_Web — visited first
2. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tim_Berners-Lee — reached by following the in-article link from the World Wide Web page (not by typing the URL), and bookmarked
3. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/CERN — opened in a separate tab and bookmarked
4. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/HTML — navigated to from the CERN tab (reusing that tab, not a new one)

At least two tabs must remain open at the end.

verification.description: Bookmark for Tim Berners-Lee page exists
